HGSS.638.0001:
Wha... I can’t make out what you’re
saying! This connection is no good!\f
Call from somewhere better, OK?
HGSS.638.0002:
Hello...
Whatever... Don’t worry about me.\r
I’m doing peachy over here!\f
HGSS.638.0003:
Are there any Gym Leaders you haven’t
battled yet?\r
Make your move! Show some initiative!
HGSS.638.0004:
If it’s not Sunday night, then I’m not
available. Call then or forget about it!
HGSS.638.0005:
I was just looking for something
to do!\r
Wanna battle me again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.638.0006:
Whatever!
I won’t lose to you again, got that?\f
I’ll be waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City.
HGSS.638.0007:
Whatever. Sounds like you’re pretty
busy yourself.
HGSS.638.0008:
Wha...?
Oh, c’mon... Haven’t you made plans\r
with enough other people?
HGSS.638.0009:
I’m waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City.\r
C’mon, show a little initiative here!
HGSS.638.0011:
Remember we made plans to battle at
the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City?\r
Wha...! Did you seriously forget?\r
C’mon, I don’t have all day!
HGSS.638.0012:
When I look at Pokémon, I get a strange
feeling--you ever get that?\f
There’s round ones, square ones, flying
ones, swimming ones, flaming ones,\r
freezing ones, shiny ones, dark ones--\r
there are so many different types, and\r
yet, they’re all Pokémon.\f
I mean, like Pokémon, there’s not
just one type of person, either...\f
But it’s still kind of strange when you
think about it.
HGSS.638.0013:
Anyway, you’re really something.\f
Traveling all by yourself, visiting all
these different Gyms you find and\r
beating them all...\f
Well, you’re not really alone...
You’ve got Pokémon with you!
HGSS.638.0014:
Man, this guy called Red brought
me down in a heartbeat.\f
I haven’t seen him in a long time...
I wonder where he is and what he’s\r
up to...\f
Come to think of it, you look a little bit
like Red. Yeah, you do.\f
Just...
Just a little bit. Whatever...
